case_title: PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK VS. FEALOFAI LAIAFA JR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LAIAFA JR, FEALOFAI DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-17-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-19-2002
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $141.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LAIAFA JR, FEALOFAI
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK SERVED FEB-05-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAIAFA JR, FEALOFAI
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-26-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST AND OF ATTY. FEES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAIAFA JR, FEALOFAI $3,137.27 PRINCIPAL, $91.97 INTEREST, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,370.24, TOTAL $ 3,370.24 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-26-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-17-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 HOURS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROVIDIAN NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LAIAFA JR, FEALOFAI
